% Frontiers in Blockchain header for Pandoc → PDF
% Single-column, 11pt, A4, 2.5cm margins

\usepackage[T1]{fontenc}
\usepackage{helvet}
\renewcommand{\familydefault}{\sfdefault}
\usepackage{graphicx}
\usepackage{setspace}
\usepackage{titlesec}
\usepackage{caption}
\usepackage{bookmark}

% Line spacing
\setstretch{1.15}

% Section headings — Frontiers uses bold sans-serif
\titleformat{\section}{\Large\bfseries}{\thesection}{1em}{}
\titlespacing*{\section}{0pt}{12pt}{6pt}

\titleformat{\subsection}{\large\bfseries}{\thesubsection}{1em}{}
\titlespacing*{\subsection}{0pt}{10pt}{4pt}

\titleformat{\subsubsection}{\normalsize\bfseries\itshape}{\thesubsubsection}{1em}{}
\titlespacing*{\subsubsection}{0pt}{8pt}{4pt}

% Captions
\captionsetup{
  font={small,sf},
  labelfont={bf},
  singlelinecheck=false
}

\hypersetup{
    unicode=true,
    breaklinks=true,
    colorlinks=true,
    linkcolor=black,
    citecolor=black,
    urlcolor=blue
}
